feed.title: Claude
feed.subtitle: Claude product updates: the Claude blog, Claude Code (what's-new and changelog), Claude Apps release notes, Claude Platform release notes and system prompts, and the Claude status incident history.

entry.title: elevated errors on Opus 48
entry.content: Jun 27 , 18:00 UTC Resolved - Elevated errors on Opus-48. It has been mitigated. We are actively monitoring the system.

entry.title: Week 25
entry.content: Week 25

entry.title: Week 26
entry.content: Week 26

entry.title: Claude Platform — June 26, 2026
entry.content: We've raised rate limits across the Claude API. Claude Sonnet and Claude Haiku rate limits now match Claude Opus at every usage tier, and usage tiers have been consolidated into three: Start, Build, and Scale. Most organizations move to a higher tier, no organization receives lower limits than before, and no action is required. You can view your tier and current limits in the Claude Console.

entry.title: Claude Platform — June 25, 2026
entry.content: We've deprecated fast mode for Claude Opus 4.7, with removal on July 24, 2026. After removal, requests to claude-opus-4-7 with speed: "fast" will return an error. Migrate to fast mode for Claude Opus 4.8. Read more in Fast mode.

entry.title: Enable Trusted Devices for Remote Control Admins for Team and Enterprise plans can now req — June 25, 2026
entry.content: Enable Trusted Devices for Remote Control Admins for Team and Enterprise plans can now require members to verify their device before viewing or steering local Claude Code sessions remotely. For more information, see Trusted Devices .

entry.title: Elevated errors on Opus 4.8 Fast
entry.content: Jun 24 , 18:33 UTC Resolved - This incident has been resolved. Jun 24 , 18:22 UTC Investigating - We are currently investigating this issue.

entry.title: Elevated error rate on Claude Opus 4.8
entry.content: Jun 24 , 14:56 UTC Resolved - This incident has been resolved. Jun 24 , 13:16 UTC Investigating - We are currently investigating this issue.

entry.title: Claude.ai is experiencing elevated error rates
entry.content: Jun 23 , 18:32 UTC Resolved - This incident has been resolved. Jun 23 , 18:32 UTC Monitoring - A fix has been implemented and we are monitoring the results. Jun 23 , 18:24 UTC Investigating - We are currently investigating this issue.

entry.title: Elevated error rate across multiple models
entry.content: Jun 23 , 16:44 UTC Resolved - This incident has been resolved. Jun 23 , 16:05 UTC Update - We have seen error rates broadly return to normal success levels across all models. We saw elevated error rates on requests to multiple models from 7:08am PT / 14:08 UTC through 8:33am PT / 15:33 UTC. Jun 23 , 15:28 UTC Update - We are continuing to monitor for any further issues. Jun 23 , 14:53 UTC Monitoring - A fix has been implemented and we are monitoring the results. Jun 23 , 14:25 UTC Identified - T

entry.title: We’ve suspended access to Claude Mythos 5 and Claude Fable 5
entry.content: Jun 13 , 00:50 UTC Monitoring - Learn more here: https://anthropic.com/news/fable-mythos-access

entry.title: Delegate work to Claude in Slack with Claude Tag Team and Enterprise plans can now tag Cla — June 23, 2026
entry.content: Delegate work to Claude in Slack with Claude Tag Team and Enterprise plans can now tag Claude directly in Slack conversations and delegate tasks to it while they focus on other work. For more information, see our blog post: Introducing Claude Tag .

entry.title: Elevated Error Rates for Opus 4.8, Opus 4.7, Opus 4.6, Sonnet 4.6, and Haiku 4.5
entry.content: Jun 22 , 02:06 UTC Resolved - This incident has been resolved. Jun 22 , 02:01 UTC Monitoring - A fix has been implemented and we are monitoring the results. Jun 22 , 01:56 UTC Update - Opus 4.7 has recovered Jun 22 , 01:33 UTC Update - Haiku 4.5 has recovered Jun 22 , 01:16 UTC Update - Opus 4.8 has recovered. Jun 22 , 01:11 UTC Identified - The issue has been identified and a fix is being implemented. Jun 22 , 00:37 UTC Update - We are continuing to investigate this issue. Jun 22 , 00:37 UTC In

entry.title: The full claude desktop experience on aws google cloud and microsoft foundry
entry.content: The full claude desktop experience on aws google cloud and microsoft foundry

entry.title: Elevated error rates on the Claude API
entry.content: Jun 19 , 08:45 UTC Resolved - This incident has been resolved. Jun 19 , 08:37 UTC Monitoring - A fix has been implemented and we are monitoring the results. Jun 19 , 08:17 UTC Investigating - We are currently investigating this issue.

entry.title: Service disruption on Claude services
entry.content: Jun 18 , 08:19 UTC Resolved - The issue affecting Claude services has been resolved. Impact occurred from 06:55 to 07:40 UTC. Jun 18 , 07:41 UTC Identified - We have identified the cause of the issue affecting Claude.ai and are working on a fix. We will provide an update as soon as possible.

entry.title: Claude Platform — June 18, 2026
entry.content: The Python, TypeScript, Go, Java, Ruby, PHP, and C SDKs now include support for code execution 20260120 , the code execution tool version that adds REPL state persistence and is the minimum version for programmatic tool calling. To adopt it, set the tool's type to code execution 20260120 ; no beta header is required. It's available on Claude Fable 5, Claude Mythos 5, Claude Opus 4.5 and newer, and Claude Sonnet 4.5 and newer; see the model compatibility table.

entry.content: Enterprise managed auth

entry.content: Claude Code now supports artifacts

entry.title: Elevated errors on Claude Sonnet 4.6 and Opus 4.8
entry.content: Jun 17 , 02:50 UTC Resolved - This incident has been resolved. Jun 17 , 01:52 UTC Identified - At this time, success rates for Claude Sonnet 4.6 have recovered and we are working to resolve an issue resulting in elevated errors on Opus 4.8. We will provide additional updates as soon as possible. Jun 17 , 00:47 UTC Investigating - We are currently investigating this issue.

entry.title: Elevated errors for Claude Opus 4.8
entry.content: Jun 16 , 22:02 UTC Resolved - This issue has been resolved. We saw elevated errors on requests to Claude Opus 4.8 between 1:45pm PT / 20:45 UTC and 1:58pm PT / 20:58 UTC. Jun 16 , 21:01 UTC Monitoring - We have resolved the issue resulting in elevated errors on requests to Claude Opus 4.8, and are currently monitoring closely to prevent any further issues. Jun 16 , 20:50 UTC Investigating - We are investigating elevated errors on requests to Claude Opus 4.8. We will provide an update as soon as

entry.title: Opus 4.8 errors
entry.content: Jun 16 , 20:16 UTC Resolved - This incident has been resolved. Jun 16 , 19:59 UTC Monitoring - Opus 4.8 error rates were elevated from 12:41 PDT to approximately 12:53 PDT. The team is monitoring.

entry.title: Elevated errors across many models
entry.content: Jun 16 , 19:32 UTC Resolved - The incident has now been resolved. We had two phases: * between 10:23 PT / 17:23 UTC to 11:00 PT / 18:00 UTC -- all Sonnet and Opus models were affected, reaching an error rate of around 10% * after 11:00 PT / 18:00 UTC and until 12:20 PT / 19:20 UTC -- Opus 4.8 had an average error rate of 10% The incident is now resolved. Jun 16 , 19:22 UTC Monitoring - A fix has been implemented and we are monitoring the results. Jun 16 , 19:08 UTC Update - We are continuing to

entry.content: Week 23

entry.title: Week 24
entry.content: Week 24

entry.title: Meet the winners of built with opus 4 7 claude code hackathon
entry.content: Meet the winners of built with opus 4 7 claude code hackathon

entry.title: Claude Platform — June 15, 2026
entry.content: We've retired the Claude Sonnet 4 model ( claude-sonnet-4-20250514 ) and the Claude Opus 4 model ( claude-opus-4-20250514 ). All requests to these models will now return an error. We recommend upgrading to Claude Sonnet 4.6 and Claude Opus 4.8 respectively. Researchers can request ongoing access through the External Researcher Access Program.

entry.title: Elevated errors on Claude Opus 4.8
entry.content: Jun 13 , 02:11 UTC Resolved - This incident has been resolved. Jun 13 , 02:03 UTC Investigating - We are currently investigating this issue.

entry.title: We've suspended access to Claude Fable 5 and Claude Mythos 5 — June 12, 2026
entry.content: We've suspended access to Claude Fable 5 and Claude Mythos 5. We aim to return access as quickly as we can. See our statement for more information.

entry.title: Elevated errors across models
entry.content: Jun 11 , 17:56 UTC Resolved - The issue affecting various models has been resolved. Impact occurred from 09:42am PT / 16:42 UTC to 10:03am PT / 17:03 UTC. Jun 11 , 17:27 UTC Monitoring - A fix has been implemented and we are monitoring the results. Jun 11 , 16:54 UTC Investigating - We are currently investigating this issue.

entry.title: Elevated errors on Claude Opus 4.6
entry.content: Jun 11 , 15:01 UTC Resolved - This incident has been resolved. Jun 11 , 14:58 UTC Monitoring - A fix has been implemented and we are monitoring the results. Jun 11 , 14:37 UTC Identified - The issue has been identified and a fix is being implemented. Jun 11 , 14:37 UTC Investigating - We are currently investigating this issue.

entry.title: Claude Platform — June 11, 2026
entry.content: The code execution tool now supports code execution 20260521 , which discloses the 90-second per-cell execution time limit in the tool description so Claude can budget long-running cells. No beta header is required. The web search tool and web fetch tool now support web search 20260318 and web fetch 20260318 , adding a response inclusion parameter to drop consumed result blocks from the API response for agentic workflows. No beta header is required.

entry.title: Elevated errors on Claude Haiku 4.5
entry.content: Jun 10 , 17:21 UTC Resolved - This incident has been resolved. Jun 10 , 17:13 UTC Update - We are continuing to monitor Claude Haiku 4.5 towards full recovery, and at this point have seen success rates recover to close to normal operating levels. We are working to ensure there are no further issues. Jun 10 , 16:20 UTC Monitoring - A fix has been implemented and we are monitoring the results. Jun 10 , 14:59 UTC Update - We are continuing to work on a fix for this issue. Jun 10 , 13:19 UTC Identif

entry.title: Claude Platform — June 10, 2026
entry.content: The GET /v1/environments/{id}/work endpoint, which lists pending work for a self-hosted sandbox, is now available on Claude Platform on AWS. See IAM actions for Claude Platform on AWS for the GetEnvironment action that authorizes it.

entry.title: Building with claude managed agents
entry.content: Building with claude managed agents

entry.title: System prompt — Claude Fable 5
entry.content: \ \ Here is some information about Claude and Anthropic's products in case the person asks: This iteration of Claude is Claude Fable 5, the first model in Anthropic's new Claude 5 family and part of a new Mythos-class model tier that sits above Claude Opus in capability. Claude Fable 5 and Claude Mythos 5 share the same underlying model. Claude Fable 5 is the most intelligent generally available model, and includes additional safety measures for dual-use capabilities, while Claude Mythos 5 is av

entry.title: Whats new in claude managed agents
entry.content: Whats new in claude managed agents

entry.title: Claude Platform — June 9, 2026
entry.content: We've launched Claude Fable 5 ( claude-fable-5 ), our most capable widely released model, alongside Claude Mythos 5 ( claude-mythos-5 ) for Project Glasswing participants. Both models support a 1M token context window by default, 128k max output tokens, and always-on adaptive thinking. See Introducing Claude Fable 5 and Claude Mythos 5 for capabilities, API changes, and availability. Claude Fable 5 and Claude Mythos 5 use the tokenizer introduced with Claude Opus 4.7. Compared to models before C

entry.title: Claude Fable 5 launch We launched Claude Fable 5, a Mythos-class model that we’ve made saf — June 9, 2026
entry.content: Claude Fable 5 launch We launched Claude Fable 5, a Mythos-class model that we’ve made safe for general use. For more information, see our blog post: Claude Fable 5 and Claude Mythos 5 .

entry.title: Building intelligent apps for Apple platforms with Claude in the Foundation Models framework
entry.content: Building intelligent apps for Apple platforms with Claude in the Foundation Models framework

entry.title: Observability for developers building connectors
entry.content: Observability for developers building connectors

entry.title: Claude Platform — June 5, 2026
entry.content: We announced the deprecation of the Claude Opus 4.1 model ( claude-opus-4-1-20250805 ), with retirement on the Claude API scheduled for August 5, 2026. We recommend migrating to Claude Opus 4.8. Read more in model deprecations.

entry.content: The claude cowork product guide

entry.title: Running an ai native engineering org
entry.content: Running an ai native engineering org

entry.title: Enterprise plans can manage admin permissions with custom roles We extended the existing c — June 2, 2026
entry.content: Enterprise plans can manage admin permissions with custom roles We extended the existing custom roles framework by adding admin permissions. Admin permissions give members access to specific administrative areas, like billing or privacy, without the need to make them Owners. For more information, see Manage custom roles on Enterprise plans .

entry.title: A harness for every task dynamic workflows in claude code
entry.content: A harness for every task dynamic workflows in claude code

entry.title: Claude Platform — June 2, 2026
entry.content: The advisor tool now supports a max tokens parameter to cap the advisor model's output per call, reducing latency and output token cost for workloads that don't need full-length advisor responses. Set tools[].max tokens on the advisor tool definition; see Capping advisor output.

entry.title: Week 21
entry.content: Week 21

entry.title: Week 22
entry.content: Week 22

entry.title: Claude Platform — May 29, 2026
entry.content: Claude Managed Agents webhooks, multiagent orchestration, and self-hosted sandboxes are now available on Claude Platform on AWS. See IAM actions for Claude Platform on AWS for the new IAM actions and the AnthropicSelfHostedEnvironmentAccess managed policy.

entry.title: System prompt — Claude Opus 4.8
entry.content: \ \ Here is some information about Claude and Anthropic's products in case the person asks: The currently selected version of Claude is Claude Opus 4.8. Claude Opus 4.8 is the newest Claude model, and the most advanced model publicly available. Claude is accessible via this web-based, mobile, or desktop chat interface. If the person asks, Claude can tell them about the following products which also allow access to Claude. Claude is accessible via an API and Claude Platform. The most recent publi

entry.title: Claude Platform — May 28, 2026
entry.content: We've launched ( ), our most capable generally available model. supports a 1M token context window by default, 128k max output tokens, and the same set of tools and platform features as Claude Opus 4.7. See What's new in for capability improvements, new features, and migration guidance. We've launched mid-conversation system messages. On , you can send role: "system" messages at non-first positions in the messages array, preserving prompt cache hits when instructions change during a long-running

entry.title: Claude Opus 4.8 launch We’ve upgraded Claude Opus to a new version — May 28, 2026
entry.content: Claude Opus 4.8 launch We’ve upgraded Claude Opus to a new version. Claude Opus 4.8 shows improvements over Opus 4.7 in coding, agentic skills, reasoning, and practical knowledge work tasks. For more information, see our blog post: Introducing Claude Opus 4.8 . Enterprise plans can manage connector access with custom roles We added connector permissions to extend the existing custom roles framework and allow administrators to control which connectors, and which individual tools on those connect

entry.title: Introducing dynamic workflows in claude code
entry.content: Introducing dynamic workflows in claude code

entry.title: Claude Platform — May 27, 2026
entry.content: The Messages API response now includes usage.output tokens details.thinking tokens , reporting how many of the billed output tokens were extended thinking. When streaming, the breakdown appears only on the final message delta event. No beta header is required.

entry.title: Zero trust for ai agents
entry.content: Zero trust for ai agents

entry.title: How coderabbit used claude to build an agent orchestration system
entry.content: How coderabbit used claude to build an agent orchestration system

entry.content: Using llms to secure source code

entry.title: Code w claude london 2026 rethinking how we build
entry.content: Code w claude london 2026 rethinking how we build

entry.title: How anthropics finance team uses claude to shape the narrative behind the numbers
entry.content: How anthropics finance team uses claude to shape the narrative behind the numbers

entry.title: Claude now works with more security and compliance tools We introduced Claude Compliance A — May 21, 2026
entry.content: Claude now works with more security and compliance tools We introduced Claude Compliance API integrations with notable security and compliance tools. Now IT and security teams can govern Claude across our platform and suite of products, the same way they govern other applications in their stack. Learn how to get started with Claude Compliance API integrations .

entry.title: How our partners are putting opus to work for cybersecurity
entry.content: How our partners are putting opus to work for cybersecurity

entry.title: Compliance api security partners
entry.content: Compliance api security partners

entry.title: Using claude code the unreasonable effectiveness of html
entry.content: Using claude code the unreasonable effectiveness of html

entry.title: Week 20
entry.content: Week 20

entry.title: Claude Platform — May 19, 2026
entry.content: MCP tunnels is now available as a Research Preview, so you can connect to MCP servers in your private network. Self-hosted sandboxes are now available for Claude Managed Agents, as an alternative to running tool execution in Anthropic's infrastructure. See Self-hosted sandboxes. With Claude Managed Agents, you can now update the agent's MCP server and tool configurations associated with an active session. With Claude Managed Agents, large outputs from agent toolset and MCP tools exceeding 100K t

entry.title: New in Claude Managed Agents: self-hosted sandboxes and MCP tunnels
entry.content: New in Claude Managed Agents: self-hosted sandboxes and MCP tunnels

entry.title: Claude Platform — May 18, 2026
entry.content: The web search tool now returns richer SEC filing data, making it easier to ground financial research agents, earnings analysis, and due-diligence workflows in primary sources with citations.

entry.title: Deploying claude across the legal industry
entry.content: Deploying claude across the legal industry

entry.title: How claude code works in large codebases best practices and where to start
entry.content: How claude code works in large codebases best practices and where to start

entry.title: The founders playbook
entry.content: The founders playbook

entry.title: Claude Platform — May 13, 2026
entry.content: We've launched cache diagnostics in public beta. Pass diagnostics.previous message id on a Messages request and the API reports a cache miss reason explaining where the prompt cache prefix diverged from the previous turn. Include the cache-diagnosis-2026-04-07 beta header in your requests.

entry.title: Best practices for computer and browser use with claude
entry.content: Best practices for computer and browser use with claude

entry.title: Claude Platform — May 12, 2026
entry.content: Fast mode (research preview) now supports Claude Opus 4.7. Set speed: "fast" with model: "claude-opus-4-7" and the fast-mode-2026-02-01 beta header for significantly faster output token generation at premium pricing. Pricing, rate limits, and access are the same as for Opus 4.6 fast mode; interested customers should join the waitlist.

entry.title: Claude Platform — May 11, 2026
entry.content: We've launched Claude Platform on AWS , bringing the Claude API to Anthropic-managed infrastructure accessible through AWS, with AWS billing and IAM authentication. Access the full Messages API, Files API, Message Batches API, Claude Managed Agents, Agent Skills, code execution, and tool use through native AWS endpoints. Learn more in Claude Platform on AWS.

entry.title: Week 18
entry.content: Week 18

entry.title: Week 19
entry.content: Week 19

entry.title: Claude Platform — May 6, 2026
entry.content: Multiagent sessions and Outcomes are now in public beta under the standard managed-agents-2026-04-01 beta header. Claude Managed Agents vault credential background refresh is now supported for mcp oauth credentials. See Authenticate with vaults. Webhooks for Claude Managed Agents are now supported. Webhook event types include session and vault lifecycle events. See Subscribe to webhooks. Additional filtering and sorting options are now supported for Claude Managed Agents. Sessions can be filtere

entry.title: New in Claude Managed Agents: dreaming, outcomes, and multiagent orchestration
entry.content: New in Claude Managed Agents: dreaming, outcomes, and multiagent orchestration

entry.title: Claude Platform — May 4, 2026
entry.content: Workload Identity Federation is now generally available. Authenticate workloads to the Claude API with short-lived OIDC tokens from your own identity provider (AWS IAM, Google Cloud, GitHub Actions, Kubernetes, Microsoft Entra ID, Okta, SPIFFE, and more) instead of long-lived static API keys. Configure issuers and federation rules in the Claude Console, and the SDK handles token exchange and refresh automatically. See Authentication.

entry.title: Claude Platform — April 30, 2026
entry.content: We've retired the 1M token context window beta ( context-1m-2025-08-07 ) for Claude Sonnet 4.5 and Claude Sonnet 4. The beta header now has no effect on these models, and requests exceeding the standard 200k-token context window return an error. To use the 1M context window, migrate to Claude Sonnet 4.6 or Claude Opus 4.6, where it's generally available at standard pricing with no beta header required.

entry.title: Claude Platform — April 29, 2026
entry.content: We've released the Claude API skill, an open-source Agent Skill that gives Claude up-to-date reference material for building on the Messages API and Claude Managed Agents across 8 languages. The skill is bundled with Claude Code and available in the Anthropic skills repository.

entry.title: Week 16
entry.content: Week 16

entry.title: Week 17
entry.content: Week 17

entry.title: Claude Platform — April 24, 2026
entry.content: We've released the Rate Limits API, allowing administrators to programmatically query the rate limits configured for their organization and workspaces.

entry.title: Claude Platform — April 23, 2026
entry.content: Memory for Claude Managed Agents is now in public beta under the standard managed-agents-2026-04-01 header. See Using agent memory for the full integration guide.

entry.title: Built-in memory for Claude Managed Agents
entry.content: Built-in memory for Claude Managed Agents

entry.title: New connectors in Claude for everyday life
entry.content: New connectors in Claude for everyday life

entry.title: Claude Platform — April 20, 2026
entry.content: We've retired the Claude Haiku 3 model ( claude-3-haiku-20240307 ). All requests to this model will now return an error. We recommend upgrading to Claude Haiku 4.5.

entry.title: Claude Design by Anthropic Labs With Opus 4.7, we also launched Claude Design, a new Anthr — April 17, 2026
entry.content: Claude Design by Anthropic Labs With Opus 4.7, we also launched Claude Design, a new Anthropic Labs product that lets you collaborate with Claude to create visual outputs like designs, prototypes, slides, and one-pagers. For more information, see Get started with Claude Design .

entry.title: System prompt — Claude Opus 4.7
entry.content: \ \ Here is some information about Claude and Anthropic's products in case the person asks: This iteration of Claude is Claude Opus 4.7 from the Claude 4.7 model family. The Claude 4.7 family currently consists of Claude Opus 4.7. Claude Opus 4.7 is the most advanced and intelligent model. Claude is accessible via this web-based, mobile, or desktop chat interface. If the person asks, Claude can tell them about the following products which also allow them to access Claude. Claude is accessible vi

entry.title: Claude Platform — April 16, 2026
entry.content: We've launched Claude Opus 4.7, our most capable generally available model for complex reasoning and agentic coding, at the same $5 / $25 per MTok pricing as Opus 4.6. See What's new in Claude Opus 4.7 for capability improvements, new features, and the updated tokenizer. Opus 4.7 includes API breaking changes versus Opus 4.6; see Migrating to Claude Opus 4.7 before upgrading. Claude in Amazon Bedrock is now open to all Amazon Bedrock customers. Claude Opus 4.7 and Claude Haiku 4.5 are available

entry.title: Claude Opus 4.7 launch Our latest model, Claude Opus 4.7, is now generally available — April 16, 2026
entry.content: Claude Opus 4.7 launch Our latest model, Claude Opus 4.7, is now generally available. Opus 4.7 shows improvements in software engineering and complex, long-running coding tasks, as well as better vision, allowing it to see images in higher resolution. For more information, see our blog post: Introducing Claude Opus 4.7 .

entry.title: Claude Platform — April 14, 2026
entry.content: We announced the deprecation of the Claude Sonnet 4 model ( claude-sonnet-4-20250514 ) and the Claude Opus 4 model ( claude-opus-4-20250514 ), with retirement on the Claude API scheduled for June 15, 2026. We recommend migrating to Claude Sonnet 4.6 and Claude Opus 4.7 respectively. Read more in model deprecations.

entry.title: Redesigning Claude Code on desktop for parallel agents
entry.content: Redesigning Claude Code on desktop for parallel agents

entry.title: Week 15
entry.content: Week 15

entry.title: Preparing your security program for AI-accelerated offense
entry.content: Preparing your security program for AI-accelerated offense

entry.title: Claude Platform — April 9, 2026
entry.content: We've launched the advisor tool in public beta. Pair a faster executor model with a higher-intelligence advisor model that provides strategic guidance mid-generation, so long-horizon agentic workloads get close to advisor-solo quality while the bulk of token generation happens at executor-model rates. Include the beta header advisor-tool-2026-03-01 in your requests.

entry.title: Claude Cowork generally available Claude Cowork is now generally available on macOS and Wi — April 9, 2026
entry.content: Claude Cowork generally available Claude Cowork is now generally available on macOS and Windows through the Claude Desktop app. With this, we’re expanding Claude Cowork with new capabilities: Claude Cowork in the Analytics API. For more information, see Claude Enterprise Analytics API: Access engagement and adoption data . Usage analytics for Claude Cowork. For more information, see View usage analytics for Team and Enterprise plans . Claude Cowork OpenTelemetry support. For more information, se
